zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol於1339年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Giles de Throckmorton30歲，母親Agnes Fraunceys24歲。他於1381年與Agnes Besford在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾福拉德波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利享年73歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

variants.name: Throgmorton
meanings: English: variant of   Throckmorton  .

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: St
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Pol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Guillermo, Manuel, Jose, Juan, Rafael, Abelardo, Adolfo, Ana, Angel, Beatriz, Fernando, Gilberto.
Catalan and French (mainly northern, also Occitan): from the personal name Pol, equivalent to Paul .
Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a grassy mound, from Middle Dutch pol ‘tussock’.

variants.name: Polus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois.
Polish (Poluś): from a pet form of the personal name Pol .
French: from a Latinized form of   Paul  .

variants.name: Polek
meanings: Polish: from a pet form of the personal name Pol (see Pol 5).

variants.name: Poll
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Heinz, Gerda, Gerhard, Kurt, Otto.
Dutch: variant of   Pol   2.
English (Norfolk): variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol was born in 1339, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Giles de Throckmorton, was 30 and his mother, Agnes Fraunceys, was 24. He married Agnes Besford in 1381, in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1412, in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol est né en 1339, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Giles de Throckmorton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Fraunceys, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Besford en 1381, à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1412, à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol 1339 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giles de Throckmorton 30 und seine Mutter Agnes Fraunceys 24. Er hat 1381 in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Besford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1412 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Polが1339年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Giles de Throckmortonは30歳，母Agnes Fraunceysは24歳であった。1381年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーでAgnes Besfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーで73歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol(이)가 1339년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giles de Throckmorton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Fraunceys(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1381년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 플라드버이에서 Agnes Besford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Besford em 1381, em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Throckmorton, Count de St. Pol родился в 1339 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Giles de Throckmorton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Fraunceys, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Besford в 1381 г. в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1412 г. в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Agnes Besford en 1381, en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1412, en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
